title: LHS Weekly JSON Schema Reference
description: Each week of LineHaul Station marketing history is stored as a single JSON file named week_YYYY-MM-DD.json where the date is the Monday of that week. A _manifest.json file indexes all weeks.

angbot_workflow: 1. Ang pulls weekly Meta ad report (CSV)
2. Convert CSV to weekly JSON using this schema
3. Place JSON in the weekly_jsons folder (or GitHub repo)
4. AngBot reads _manifest.json to find all available weeks
5. AngBot loads whichever weeks it needs for the requested report
usage.corrections: To fix a mistake, edit the specific week's JSON and re-upload. No rebuild needed.
usage.new_week: Create a new week_YYYY-MM-DD.json and add its entry to _manifest.json

confidence_levels.confirmed_csv: Data pulled directly from Ang's Meta ad manager CSV export for that exact week
confidence_levels.confirmed_pdf: Data pulled from a PDF weekly insights report for that exact week
confidence_levels.estimated: Derived from aggregate reports, pro-rated from longer date ranges, or interpolated

meta.milestone: Notable event this week (empty string if none)

summary.total_results: int (conversions, clicks, etc depending on campaign type)
summary.total_ad_count: int (all ads in report including inactive)
